transcript: It was an instant attraction to that new way of life Escape from your suburban home With a growing reaction to that dissatisfaction of the rules laid down so long ago So you sat and learned while the table turned And spoke with new ideals And when it was time, you turned on your mind You flipped on the switch, you started to climb And all those lights, they're blinding Many for you to choose And it shows your own path, and now man it is How fast had you looked around, and where you're standing tired now I think you're sorry now, look how you started out Do you even know why you still love rock'n'roll And with a poison guitar you thought that you went too far With nothing but an open road To change the minds of the changing times But that was so, so long ago And along with time came a wonder in mind With thoughts that scattered like the wind And with your voice and guitar Have you gone very far? Is it for love or is it all for star? How are the lights still pointing?
